data.title: Bitcoin hits 4-week low, dropping below $109K. Long-term holders lock in 3.4M profits, ETF inflows decrease. Cycle exhaustion may be looming.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin fell to below $109,000 as individuals who held onto the cryptocurrency for an extended period saw profits from 3.4 million Bitcoins. Additionally, there was a decrease in the inflow of funds into ETFs, suggesting a possible exhaustion in the current cycle.

data.title: Mirion raises $325 million in upsized offering of 0.00% Convertible Senior Notes due 2031 to qualified institutional buyers.
data.description: Atlanta-based Mirion Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: MIR) disclosed that it has priced $325.0 million aggregate principal amount of 0.00% Convertible Senior Notes due 2031 in a private placement to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. The offering, known as the convertible notes offering, saw an increase in size from previous plans.

data.title: Mirion Tech boosts common stock offering to 17,309,846 shares at $21.35/share, raised from $350.0M; 2,596,476 option granted to underwriters.
data.description: Atlanta-based Mirion Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: MIR) disclosed the pricing details of an underwritten public offering of 17,309,846 shares of its Class A common stock at $21.35 per share. The offering saw an increase from the initial plan of $350.0 million worth of shares. Moreover, the underwriters have been granted an option to buy up to an extra 2,596,476 shares.

data.title: Cipher Mining priced a private offering of $1.1 billion of 0.00% convertible senior notes, an increase from the initial $800 million, with a 13-day option for an additional $200 million. Settling on Sept 30, 2025.
data.description: Cipher Mining Inc., a prominent developer and operator of industrial-scale data centers, disclosed the pricing of its offering of $1.1 billion aggregate principal amount of 0.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 in a private offering. The offering size was raised from $800 million to $1.1 billion. The notes are being offered to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. The issuance and sale of the notes are expected to be completed on September 30, 2025, pending customary closing conditions. Additionally, Cipher granted the initial purchasers of the notes a 13-day option to acquire up to an additional $200 million aggregate principal amount of notes.

data.title: Analysts predict Q4 crypto gains driven by new ETPs, stablecoins, and policy changes.
data.description: According to analysts, the cryptocurrency market may see significant developments in the upcoming fourth quarter. Favorable policy changes, increased access to Exchange Traded Products (ETPs), and the rising popularity of stablecoins are expected to be the primary focus areas. These trends could shape the market dynamics in the near future, creating opportunities for investors.

data.title: XRP drops 4%, faces heavy sell-off, 5% decline in 24 hours, trading volume surges by 40%, asset down over 10% in a week.
data.description: XRP experienced a significant decline along with other cryptocurrencies amidst economic uncertainty. The fourth-largest cryptocurrency in terms of market capitalization, XRP, dropped by over 5% within 24 hours, with a notable 40% increase in trading volume indicating intense selling pressure. This drop exceeded losses seen in Bitcoin and Ethereum. Over the span of a week, XRP saw a decrease of more than 10%, reaching a market value of $9 billion. The hope for interest rate cuts was diminished by stronger economic data, leading to a decrease in both stock and cryptocurrency prices. Additionally, XRP’s open interest decreased by 1.79%, with approximately $1.5 billion in futures contracts eliminated.

data.title: Bitwise aims to launch ETF tracking Hyperliquid's token amid record volumes on crypto futures exchanges.
data.description: Bitwise is in the process of introducing an exchange-traded product that will monitor Hyperliquid's token. This initiative comes as trading volumes on cryptocurrency futures exchanges have reached record highs.

data.title: uniQure is offering 5,789,473 shares at $47.50 each, raising approximately $300 million in total.
data.description: uniQure N.V. announced the pricing of its underwritten public offering of 5,789,473 ordinary shares at $47.50 per share, along with pre-funded warrants for 526,316 ordinary shares. The offering is expected to yield gross proceeds of around $300 million for uniQure before deductions. The underwriters have a 30-day option to buy up to 947,368 additional shares at the same price. The offering is set to close around September 29, 2025, pending standard closing conditions.
